mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.summary, p.cover_image AS coverImage, p.author_id AS authorId, u.username AS authorName, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, p.status, p.is_top AS isTop, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, p.publish_time AS publishTime FROM blog_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
